revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''3-1-060

(Instantaneous) Sound pressure (at a point in a medium)

The difference between the pressure existing at the instant considered and the static pressure.


Reference: I.E.C. (extract)

{{IALAFooter}}
